name: TrustClaw TRA
description: Trust Runtime for Agent — HTTP APIs, tools, and runtime integration for OpenClaw Gateway.

dbPath.description: Override TRA SQLite path (default: state/local_tra.db under OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR)

agentPacksDir.description: Override business agent pack directory (default: trustclaw/agents)

defaultAgentPack.description: Default agent pack id when OpenClaw agentId is not mapped (default: glp1-eligibility)
